channel.title: Abraham Toledo
channel.description: I build things for fun, and I write about it here.

item.title: To Skill or Not to Skill
item.description: Skills have become the default pattern in agent frameworks. Maybe we should pause and think about whether they deserve that status.

item.title: Building a Fighting Game in One Day with Claude: A Self-Bootstrapping Experiment
item.description: How I built Food Fighters -- a fully playable 2D fighting game with pixel art and chiptune audio -- in under 24 hours using Claude as an autonomous agent with a single bootstrap file.

item.title: We aren't as intelligent as we think
item.description: Why we are not so intelligent as we think we are, and how AI can take a lesson or two from humans

item.title: I know that I know nothing
item.description: Making claude code supervise its own thought process and calibrate for its own limits. An awareness excercise.

item.title: How to Write Tests That Don't Suck, and how to Teach AI to Do the Same
item.description: A deep dive into writing effective tests and creating AI agents that uphold testing quality
